title: ida labelloviridis
intro: Ida labelloviridis, also known as Idaea, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Idaea and family Apocynaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ida labelloviridis include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared in herbal form by making teas or tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
intro_study: According to "Phytotherapy research : PTR", ida labelloviridis benefits include enhancing the production of anti-inflammatory interleukin-10 (IL-10), which implies it may have anti-inflammatory properties.
